summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of webbuild247.com landing page. All core functionality working correctly with minor WhatsApp URL format observation.

design_issues.issue: WhatsApp links use api.whatsapp.com format instead of wa.me format, but functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Hero section loads with Get Started and WhatsApp Now buttons
Header navigation links work and scroll to correct sections (About, Services, Portfolio, FAQ, Blog)
Get Started button scrolls to contact section
WhatsApp buttons redirect to WhatsApp (functional despite URL format)
Portfolio section displays 6 projects with external links working
FAQ accordion expands/collapses correctly (8 FAQ items)
Testimonials carousel navigation (prev/next buttons and dots)
Contact form validates required fields (name, email, message)
Contact form submit opens mailto with form data and shows success toast
WhatsApp link in contact section works
Footer Get Started and WhatsApp buttons work
Mobile responsive design with working mobile menu toggle
Scroll to top button in footer works
Footer email link has correct mailto format
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
success_percentage: frontend: 98% (all core functionality working, minor URL format observation)
